articles.title: Why People in the UK Are Worried About Shopping
articles.summary: A survey shows that people in the UK are feeling less confident about spending money because they are worried about a war between the US, Israel, and Iran. This war is causing problems like higher energy prices, which make things like petrol and household bills more expensive. As a result, shoppers are buying less, especially big items like furniture, and are saving more money instead. Experts say this fear might lead to slower economic growth in the UK. The survey found that confidence dropped a little in March, and people think the economy will not do well in the next year. This is a sign that spending could decrease more in the future.

articles.title: A Funny Game Where Comedians Try Not to Laugh
articles.summary: This article is about a TV show called Last One Laughing. In this show, comedians like Maisie Adam try to make others laugh while keeping a straight face. They are in a room with nine other comedians for six hours. If they laugh once, they get a yellow card from host Jimmy Carr. If they laugh twice, they get a red card and are out of the game. Maisie says it feels like being in school where friends try to make you laugh. She was nervous about facing Bob Mortimer, who won the first season. The show is on Prime Video and is popular in British comedy. It is hard not to laugh when others are being funny.

articles.title: A Chef Who Learned by Himself Wins a Big Cooking Show
articles.summary: Gareth Baty, a chef who taught himself to cook, has won MasterChef: The Professionals, a famous TV cooking competition. He beat many other chefs in challenges judged by experts like Monica Galetti and Marcus Wareing. Gareth made three special dishes for the final: a starter inspired by his mom, a main course for his dad, and a dessert for his wife's family. The judges loved his food, saying it was perfect and full of heart. Gareth said cooking from the heart helped him win, and he enjoyed watching the final with his family who supported him. This story shows that passion and hard work can lead to success.

articles.title: Raye's New Album: Music with Hope
articles.summary: Raye is a singer who used to make boring dance songs for a record label, but she left to make her own music. Her first album was a big hit and won many awards. Now, she has a new album called This Music May Contain Hope. It is about feeling sad or unsure but finding happiness again. The music sounds like old jazz and soul songs, which she loves. Raye sings about her life in places like Paris and South London. She wants her music to make people feel hopeful and strong.

articles.title: Olivia Dean Wins Big at Music Awards
articles.summary: Olivia Dean is a singer from London who won three big prizes at the Mobo Awards. The awards celebrate black artists in music and entertainment. Olivia won for best album, best female act, and best song. She was very happy and thanked black feminists who inspire her. Other artists like Slick Rick and Pharrell Williams also won awards. The Mobo Awards had a special 30th anniversary show in Manchester. Olivia performed one of her songs at the event. This adds to her other awards like Brits and a Grammy earlier this year.

articles.title: Coco Gauff Plays in Her First Miami Open Final
articles.summary: Coco Gauff, a young American tennis player, won her match against Karolina Muchova to reach her first Miami Open final. She will play against Aryna Sabalenka, who is the world number one, for the title. Gauff is from Florida and is 22 years old. She won her match easily, losing only two games. Sabalenka also won her match against Elena Rybakina to get to the final. Gauff will move up to third in the world rankings next week. She is happy to play at home with family support. Sabalenka has been playing very well this year, winning many matches. The final will be exciting as both players have won six matches against each other before.
